rationale: Storing OAuth secrets or connection strings in plain text in config files leads to credential exposure. Use Azure Key Vault or Environment Variables.
Downloading binaries via curl/wget from unverified URLs (like raw github) is an attack vector. Use verified package managers or checksums.
Blocking calls in high-traffic ASP.NET Core paths leads to thread pool starvation. Always use async/await (e.g. ToListAsync).
